name: jzero-skills
description: Comprehensive knowledge base for jzero framework (enhanced go-zero). Use this skill when working with jzero to understand correct patterns for REST APIs (Handler/Logic/Context architecture), RPC services (service discovery, load balancing), Gateway services, database operations (sqlx, MongoDB, caching), resilience patterns (circuit breaker, rate limiting), and jzero-specific features (git-change-based generation, flexible configuration, custom templates).
